events.text: Goal!  Serbia 1, Switzerland 0. Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Dusan Tadic with a cross.
Sergej Milinkovic-Savic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luka Milivojevic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nemanja Matic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Serbia 1, Switzerland 1. Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner.
Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Serbia 1, Switzerland 2. Xherdan Shaqiri (Switzerland) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mario Gavranovic   following a fast break.
Xherdan Shaqiri (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
